case_title: RACHEL BLANEY VS. BLACK STERLING FRIESIANS, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BLANEY, RACHEL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BLACK STERLING FRIESIANS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,580.00 PRINCIPAL, $56,713.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $915.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $61,208.75, PLUS 10% PER ANNUM INTEREST ON PRINCIPAL UNTIL PAID - SEE SCANNED DOC

Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Flom of Donahue Fitzgerald LLP telephone number 925-980-7536 for Plaitniff Rachel Blaney.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER RACHEL BLANEY'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Fees And Costs is granted. No opposition filed. Order and separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
